revision_history.description: New data model format and notation; add IdentifyType

cluster_id.name: Identify
cluster_id.summary: Facilitates the identification of a device or endpoint, typically through visual or audible means, to help users locate or confirm a specific device.

classification.summary: A fundamental utility cluster operating at the endpoint level, providing basic identification functionality for a specific part of a device.

values.name: LightOutput
values.summary: Light output of a lighting product.

values.name: Display
values.summary: Presentation will be visible on display screen.

values.name: Actuator
values.summary: Presentation will be conveyed by actuator functionality such as through a window blind operation or in-wall relay.

values.name: Blink
values.summary: e.g., Light is turned on/off once.

values.name: Breathe
values.summary: e.g., Light is turned on/off over 1 second and repeated 15 times.

values.name: Okay
values.summary: e.g., Colored light turns green for 1 second; non-colored light flashes twice.

values.name: ChannelChange
values.summary: e.g., Colored light turns orange for 8 seconds; non-colored light switches to the maximum brightness for 0.5s and then minimum brightness for 7.5s.

values.name: FinishEffect
values.summary: Complete the current effect sequence before terminating. e.g., if in the middle of a breathe effect (as above), first complete the current 1s breathe effect and then terminate the effect.

values.name: StopEffect
values.summary: Terminate the effect as soon as possible.

values.name: Default
values.summary: Indicates the default effect is used

attributes.name: IdentifyTime
attributes.summary:
Remaining time (seconds) an endpoint identifies itself. Setting >0 starts identification (e.g., flashing light, 0.5s period); decrements every second. Reaching or setting to 0 terminates identification.

IF IdentifyTime > 0 THEN
    StartIdentification()
    IdentifyTime-- // per second
ELSE IF IdentifyTime == 0 THEN
    StopIdentification()
END IF

attributes.name: IdentifyType
attributes.summary: Indicates how the identification state is presented to the user. Contains values from IdentifyTypeEnum. 'None' SHALL NOT be used if other methods are available.

commands.name: Identify
commands.summary: This command starts or stops the receiving device identifying itself.

fields.name: IdentifyTime
fields.summary: The value to set the IdentifyTime attribute to, controlling the identification state duration.

commands.effect_on_receipt:
set IdentifyTime attribute := IdentifyTime field value
// Device identification state starts, continues, or stops based on IdentifyTime attribute value (as detailed in IdentifyTime attribute section)

commands.name: TriggerEffect
commands.summary: This command provides visual feedback to the user via light effects, distinct from the commissioning identify mechanism. Implementers define specific effects for various circumstances, such as indicating successful network connection.

fields.name: EffectIdentifier
fields.summary: Indicates the identify effect to use, from EffectIdentifierEnum. All enum values must be supported. Implementers may deviate from example effects but should document their handling during testing.

fields.name: EffectVariant
fields.summary: Indicates the variant of the effect specified by EffectIdentifier. If the device does not support the given variant, it SHALL use the default variant. Values are from EffectVariantEnum.

commands.effect_on_receipt:
if EffectVariant field is not supported by device then
  execute default variant of effect indicated by EffectIdentifier field
else
  execute trigger effect indicated by EffectIdentifier and EffectVariant fields
end if

references.name: ClusterRevision
references.description: Global attribute for cluster version; its value SHALL be the highest revision number in the table (not defined here)

references.name: CCB 2808
references.description: Change Control Board reference for revision 2

references.name: Data Model Spec
references.description: Base types (enum8, uint16) are defined in the Matter Data Model Specification.

references.name: IdentifyTypeEnum
references.description: An enumeration defining the possible ways the identification state can be presented to the user, used by the IdentifyType attribute.
